    pkg: include missing <string.h>

    My local environment seems to be seeing some pollution; we need
    <string.h> for strlen.

    PR:             284021
    Fixes:          2e065d74a5b0e ("pkg: add a pkgsign_verify_data [...]")
    MFC after:      immediately (trivial build fix)
